goal: Inject Gmail auth cookies into a Playwright browser context and fetch 5 inbox subject lines

steps.description: Install playwright if needed and load the cookie file
actions: Run: npm install playwright (or pip install playwright + playwright install chromium) if not available

steps.description: Launch a Playwright browser, inject the cookies, navigate to Gmail inbox
actions: Launch chromium with headless:false (so you can see it) or headless:true
Create a browser context and add all 99 cookies from the JSON file
Wait for the inbox to load (wait for email rows to appear)

steps.description: Scrape the first 5 email subject lines from the inbox
actions: Find the email subject elements in the DOM
Extract the text of the first 5 subject lines
If cookies are expired and login is required, report that in the result
Write JSON with: { ok: true/false, subjects: [...5 strings...], notes: '...' }
